Workers4 running (3 premium + 1 regular) · 200 queued. Premium runs breadth-first over all z; regular fills z=1.4 depth. Self-scheduling, auto-resubmit.
DeliverableSFR-only catalogs: sfr_corr (UM-corrected, f1∘f2) + sfr_raw, mstar_corr, mstar_raw, mpeak, position, velocity; companion n(>sfr_corr,z). No line luminosities, no selection.

Highlights

Regenerated from the latest data; extended to other redshifts as their ensembles complete.

Generating ~2000 calibrated mock galaxy catalogs on Perlmutter (AbacusSummit × rgrspit_diffsky) to estimate covariance for the Roman GRS PIT.
